zh.lifeSummary: 當Winifred Tutt於大約1527年出生在英國英格蘭哈普爾爾波爾頓時，她的父親James Tutt35歲，母親Jane Waterman35歲。她於1525年與Thomas Poynter在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於大約1588年在英國英格蘭哈普爾享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Winifred Tutt于大约1527年出生在英国英格兰哈普爾爾波爾頓时，她的父亲James Tutt35岁，母亲Jane Waterman35岁。她于1525年与Thomas Poynter在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于大约1588年在英国英格兰哈普爾享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Tutt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Tut(te) (Old English Tutta). Compare Tutty . The Old English personal name is preserved in various placenames, including Tutnall (Worcestershire) and Tuttington (Norfolk).

English: variant of Tout and perhaps also of Tott, which derives from an unrecorded Middle English personal name Tot(te), representing either Old English Tot(t)a (of uncertain origin) or Old Norse Tóti, which is probably a pet form of Old Norse Thorsteinn.

German (also Tütt): from a short form of an ancient Germanic personal name formed with the ancient Germanic element theud ‘people, tribe’ (see Dietrich ), or from a short form of Dudo, originally a name from nursery talk.

variants.name: Tuten
meanings: perhaps from an unrecorded Middle English personal name Tot(t)ing or Tut(t)ing, pet forms of Old English Tot(t)a or Tut(t)a; compare Tutt .
perhaps a topographic name from an unrecorded Middle English word toting ‘lookout place’, a derivative of Old English tōtian ‘to peep out, stick out’.

variants.name: Tout
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Tut(te) (Old English Tutta). Compare Tutty . The Old English personal name is preserved in various placenames, including Tutnall (Worcestershire) and Tuttington (Norfolk).

English: variant of Tout and perhaps also of Tott, which derives from an unrecorded Middle English personal name Tot(te), representing either Old English Tot(t)a (of uncertain origin) or Old Norse Tóti, which is probably a pet form of Old Norse Thorsteinn.

German (also Tütt): from a short form of an ancient Germanic personal name formed with the ancient Germanic element theud ‘people, tribe’ (see Dietrich ), or from a short form of Dudo, originally a name from nursery talk.

variants.name: Tutty
meanings: English (Lincolnshire and Yorkshire): from the Middle English personal name Tut(t)i, a pet form of Tut(te). See Tutt . This English name has been established in Ireland since the mid 17th century, where it has been wrongly assumed to be an Anglicized form of the surname Ó Tuathaigh (see Tuohy ).

nameMeanings.name: Winifred
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of the Welsh female personal name Gwenfrewi . The form of the name has been altered by association with   Winfred   and has been in general use among English speakers since the 16th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Winifred Tutt was born about 1527, in Chilbolton, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, James Tutt, was 35 and her mother, Jane Waterman, was 35. She married Thomas Poynter in 1525, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died about 1588, in Hampshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Winifred Tutt est née environ 1527, à Chilbolton, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, James Tutt, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Jane Waterman, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Poynter en 1525, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée environ 1588, à Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Winifred Tutt um 1527 in Chilbolton, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater James Tutt 35 und ihre Mutter Jane Waterman 35. Sie hat 1525 in England Thomas Poynter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb um 1588 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Hampshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Winifred Tutt è nata il circa 1527 nel Chilbolton, Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, James Tutt, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Jane Waterman, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Poynter nel 1525, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì circa 1588, nel Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 63 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Winifred Tutt(이)가 대략 1527년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 치볼턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James Tutt(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane Waterman(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1525년 영국에서 Thomas Poynter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1588년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Winifred Tutt родилась около 1527 г. в местности чилболтон, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени James Tutt было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane Waterman, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Poynter в 1525 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла около 1588 г. в местности хампшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 63 лет.
